fullName: Premature vision drives aberrant development of response properties in primary visual cortex
description: In-vivo multichannel electrophysiology from primary visual cortex of ferrets reared with either zero, one, or both eyes opened prematurely on postnatal day 25. Receptive-field properties (orientation, direction, spatial frequency, temporal frequency, contrast) measured at P55-68, after closure of the ocular-dominance critical period.
